alkylation reagent: alkylated with 30 mM of iodoacetamide for 30 min in dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 30 mM of iodoacetamide for 30 min in dark
cleavage agent: 2 μg of trypsin (Promega, V511A) was added to sample for overnight digestion at 37 °C
instrument: analyzed with Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer equipped with Easy-nanoLC 1200
reduction reagent: the samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
reduction concentration: the samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
